## Forum Threads

Mirap/mira-the-ai-moderatorLavakumar E•

3d ago

### The say/feel gap in research; how big is the problem actually, and what do you do about it?

There's a well-documented phenomenon in consumer and user research that most practitioners know intuitively but rarely name directly: people don't report their experience accurately. [...] A few concrete signs qual insights are misleading:   
  
(1) unanimous positivity — if everyone loves it, your screener may be too narrow or the interview is not challenging enough; (2) verbal/non-verbal mismatch, someone says "I'd buy this" but their face shows confusion or disengagement; (3) vague themes without emotional backing, "ease of use" as a finding with no moments to support it.

On safeguards: Mira shows confidence levels on emotional signals (not just a single call), surfaces the raw emotional timeline so you can verify the signal behind any AI claim, and flags moments of mismatch rather than averaging them out. The AI summary is always a starting point, the original recording, transcript, and emotional data are there for the researcher to check and override.

# MiraAlternatives

Comparing Mira’s AI-moderated interviews? Try Dovetail for a centralized insights hub and deep analysis, Theysaid for AI-led interviews and tests, Betafi as a research sidekick with notes and clips, Ween.ai to turn qualitative data into themes fast, and Sprig for in-product surveys and rapid insights.

AI Voice Agents

Text-to-Speech Software

Transcription

Real-time accuracy and low latency were non-negotiable for Mira. The AI moderator needs to process speech fast enough to generate intelligent follow-up questions mid-interview, any lag breaks the conversation flow. Deepgram's Nova model gave us the transcription speed and reliability we needed across multiple languages without compromising accuracy.

Productivity 1

100ms Video SDK

100ms Video SDKAdd live video conferencing to your app in hours, not months

Video conferencing

Live streaming platforms

Virtual events

Mira runs live moderated research sessions across 70+ countries — latency, reliability, and clean SDK integration matter. 100ms outperformed Dyte, LiveKit, and Zoom in our infra tests, especially for sessions running simultaneous facial coding and eye tracking. Zero dropped sessions across all enterprise pilots.

• [...] 5.0 (891 reviews)

AI Chatbots

Qualitative research transcripts are long, nuanced, and full of context that matters. Claude's extended context window and reasoning quality let Mira extract emotion-backed themes and researcher-grade insights from hours of interviews without losing coherence. It powers Mira's AI summaries, theme extraction, and cross-study intelligence — areas where GPT-4 and Gemini fell short in our testing.
